name: libpackage-deprecationmanager-perl
title: libpackage-deprecationmanager-perl
summary: module for managing deprecation warnings for Perl distributions
description:
module for managing deprecation warnings for Perl distributions
Package::DeprecationManager allows you to manage a set of deprecations for
one or more modules. It will issue one warning per deprecated feature used,
optionally with regard to an -api_version specified by users of your module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libpackage-deprecationmanager-perl because module for managing deprecation warnings for Perl distributions.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libpackage-deprecationmanager-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libpackage-deprecationmanager-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libpackage-deprecationmanager-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
